name: Hot Corn Beef Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 cup corn beef, canned or chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the corn beef, American cheese, green olives, catsup, onion, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Fill each Coney bun with the mixture and wrap tightly in foil.
3. Heat the filled sandwiches in an oven until heated through.
